compiled_state.title: Create tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh — baseline performance verification
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Create tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh. Script provisions a TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR with 500 synthetic tickets (400 with .archived marker, 100 without), times 'ticket list' (exclude_archived=true) 3 times and asserts median < 2s. Confirms the fast-skip optimization is functioning. Not a unit test — a performance regression guard. Create tests/perf/ directory if it does not exist. Add executable bit. testing_mode: RED (new behavior: perf assertion that will fail before fast-skip is implemented, pass after).

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Verify: script provisions 500 synthetic tickets (400 archived, 100 not)
- [ ] Verify: script times 'ticket list' 3 times and asserts median < 2s
- [ ] Verify: tests/perf/ directory created if missing
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — reviewed make_v3_ticket pattern, ticket-lifecycle.sh ARCHIVED event structure, .archived marker file convention, and TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR injection pattern
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — script runs, provisions 500 tickets (400 archived, 100 active), times 3 runs, asserts median < 2s. Currently PASS (0.419s median) — optimization already provides fast behavior. Script will catch regressions if optimization is removed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — executable bit set (-rwxr-xr-x), bash -n syntax check clean, script runs end-to-end successfully
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria met. AC1: file exists at tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh, executable. AC2: provisions 500 tickets (400 archived with ARCHIVED event + .archived marker, 100 active). AC3: times 3 runs, asserts median < threshold (default 2s). AC4: tests/perf/ directory created. Median on this machine: ~0.42s.
comments.author: Test
